description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a short, double-barrel configuration and a wooden pistol grip. The barrels are finished in a matte black, giving a robust and utilitarian appearance, and are aligned side-by-side. The grip and fore-end are made of a medium-brown wood, smoothly contoured for ergonomic handling. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with no visible safety or selector switch. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible ribbing or venting on the barrels, and the stock is truncated to a pistol grip, making the weapon highly maneuverable. The shotgun's size and features suggest it is intended for close-quarters use, typical in urban environments.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a matte black finish and a wooden pistol grip, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin black barrels aligned side-by-side and the rounded wooden grip below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the short double barrels, wooden grip, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: Muzzle view displaying the two barrel openings and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the wooden grip, double barrels, and the trigger guard from the opposite side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
